title: French-Style Flatbread with Gruyere
description: A simple and delicious French-inspired flatbread topped with melted Gruyere cheese, perfect for a quick snack or light meal.

ingredients.name: xenial cheese
ingredients.notes: soft, white cheese, similar to feta

instructions: Place flatbread squares on a baking sheet.
Top each square with shredded Gruyere cheese.
If using xenial cheese, crumble on top of Gruyere.
Bake for 5-7 minutes, or until cheese is melted and bubbly.
Remove from oven and let cool for a few minutes.
